items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for print-to-mail service integration.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the print-to-mail service integration (Lob, Inkit), but there is no evidence provided in the prior steps or linked use cases that directly addresses this requirement. The linked use case mentions the need for such integration, but without concrete API reads or persisted state checks, the validation cannot be completed. Therefore, the step is blocked due to inconclusive evidence regarding the specific integration requirement.
